response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings an impressive multi-decade software engineering career with strong TypeScript/Node.js production experience and some adjacent AI infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq). However, the role explicitly requires 8+ years building AI-driven solutions, deep expertise in RAG architectures, vector databases, and LLM optimization — none of which appear anywhere in the resume. Python, the dominant language for AI/ML engineering and a primary stated requirement, is entirely absent from his skills list. The AI-related experience described is recent, vague, and lacks specifics on models, frameworks, cloud AI services, or measurable outcomes. At Staff level with a forward-deployed, customer-facing mandate, the gap between his profile and the GenAI depth required is too wide to bridge in an interview.
strengths: Long-tenured full-stack TypeScript/Node.js engineer with proven production-scale systems experience (Dunnhumby's millions-of-RPS micro-services pipeline, Optilyz's automated mail platform)
Hands-on Model Context Protocol (MCP) server development and agentic workflow framework work at re:cinq, which is directly adjacent to the role's multi-agent and tooling responsibilities

Strong software craftsmanship fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and a consistent record of knowledge-sharing that aligns with the mentorship and engineering-excellence expectations of a Staff-level role
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the listed skills, yet it is the primary language for AI/ML engineering and an explicit hard requirement for this role
No evidence of RAG architecture design, vector database usage, LLM evaluation pipelines, or observability frameworks for AI systems — the core technical competencies the job description centers on

GenAI depth is vague and unverifiable: AI work is described only in passing ('AI-agent infrastructure', 'MCP code generators') with no named frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI), no cloud AI platform specifics, and no measurable delivery outcomes

key_factors.factor: No RAG, vector DB, or LLM experience
MCP server and agentic tooling exposure
